operational.feature_inclusion_summary: Removes direct satisfaction-based modeling features and keeps the more deployment-like public workflow.
operational.deployment_notes: This is the main public mode used by the Streamlit app and the preferred default for offline artifact generation.

survey_rich.feature_inclusion_summary: Keeps stronger explanatory survey-driven features such as burnout_index and effort_reward_gap.
survey_rich.deployment_notes: Useful for comparison and interpretation, but not the main public deployment framing.

comparison_notes: Both modes come from the trusted sibling modeling workflow. The operational mode is the main public version in this Streamlit repo.
